name: Sterilizing Shared Conduits of Noxious Agents
Dynamic Lifecycle Pruning for Extremist Signals

message:
No JSON object with 'name' and 'description' found in LLM response:

{
"type": "solution",
"description": "Digital platforms would implement "Default-Safe Content Enclosures" where all user-generated content, particularly that with potential for amplification or public visibility, undergoes stringent pre-distribution moderation and algorithmic filtering. Only content positively identified as non-extremist and aligned with platform tolerance guidelines would be permitted into general user feeds and recommendations, thereby creating an inert content bubble around each user. This system would isolate unverified or potentially harmful content into restricted review environments, completely separate from the mainstream user experience.",
